description: Lake and warehouse datasets produced by the CDC pipeline. The local JSON stands in for a managed catalog (AWS Glue, Unity Catalog, DataHub).

datasets.name: lake_cdc_events
datasets.description: Append-only history of every source change (one row per insert/update/delete).

schema.sequence: BIGINT — global order / offset of the change
schema.table_name: VARCHAR — source table the change came from
schema.primary_key: VARCHAR — primary key of the changed row
schema.data: VARCHAR — full row image as JSON
schema.captured_at: TIMESTAMP — when the change was captured
schema.ingested_at: TIMESTAMP — when the lake stored it

schema.name: VARCHAR
schema._cdc_seq: BIGINT — sequence of the last applied change
schema._loaded_at: TIMESTAMP — when the warehouse applied the change

datasets.name: wh_wallets
datasets.description: Current-state snapshot of wallets (latest balance per wallet).

schema._cdc_seq: BIGINT — sequence of the last applied change
schema._loaded_at: TIMESTAMP — when the warehouse applied the change

datasets.name: wh_wallet_ledger
datasets.description: Current-state snapshot of wallet ledger entries (append-only facts).

schema._cdc_seq: BIGINT — sequence of the last applied change
schema._loaded_at: TIMESTAMP — when the warehouse applied the change
